1: Fight against them that fight against me.
2: And stand up for mine help.
3: Say unto my soul, I am am thy salvation.
4: Let them be turned back and brought to confusion that devise my hurt.
5: And let the angel of the LORD LORD chase them them .
6: And let the angel of the LORD LORD persecute them.
7: Which Which without cause they have digged for my soul.
8: Into that very destruction let him fall.
9: It shall rejoice in his salvation.
10: Yea, the poor and the needy from him that spoileth him?
11: They laid to my charge things things that I knew not.
12: To To the spoiling of my soul.
13: And my prayer returned into mine own bosom.
14: I bowed down heavily, as one that mourneth for his for his mother.
15: Yea Yea , the abjects gathered themselves together against me, and I knew it it not; they did tear me me , and ceased not:
16: They gnashed upon me with their teeth.
17: Rescue my soul from their destructions, my darling from the lions.
18: I will praise thee among much people.
19: Neither Neither let them wink with the eye that hate me without a cause.
20: But they devise deceitful matters against them that are them that are quiet in the land.
21: And And said, Aha, aha, our eye hath seen it it .
22: O Lord, be not far from me.
23: Even Even unto my cause, my God and my Lord.
24: And let them not rejoice over me.
25: Let them not say, We have swallowed him up.
26: Let them be clothed with shame and dishonour that magnify themselves themselves against me.
27: Yea, let them say continually, Let the LORD LORD be magnified, which hath pleasure in the prosperity of his servant.
28: And And of thy praise all the day long.
